description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this beige shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. The bag is large enough to accommodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciative glances all day long. The versatile bag looks as great with casual outfits as it does with your formal wear. Time to take the office by storm, and be the coolest chick at the mall too! Made of leather for enhanced durability and styleTwo roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket to hold essentialsSmall zippered compartment at the back for stowing essentialsTwo padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfortFixed short belt with metal buckles on the sidesFront handle attached to the bag with metal loops for added styleBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
